info.title: Student Skill Exchange API
info.description:
Backend API for the Skill Exchange platform. Auth (register/login), Users CRUD with RBAC, transactions (match-request, paid-exchange, confirm-form2), **matching** (Form 1 / Form 2 eligibility), universities, skills, exchanges, sessions, reviews, portfolio, payments. Protected routes require Authorization: Bearer <JWT>.

## Live Chat (real-time)
- **Send message:** REST only — POST /api/v1/conversations/{id}/messages with body { "content": "..." }. After saving, the server emits the same message over Socket.io to the conversation room so the other participant sees it in real time.
- **Exchange readiness:** PATCH /api/v1/conversations/{id}/exchange-readiness with { "ready": true|false }; server emits `exchange_readiness` to the conversation room (same join as chat).
- **Socket.io:** Same origin as API (e.g. http://localhost:5000). Auth: handshake with auth.token = 'Bearer <JWT>' or query token=<JWT>. Events: emit 'join_conversation' with { conversationId } to join (student, participant only); emit 'leave_conversation' with { conversationId }; listen 'message' for new messages; listen 'exchange_readiness' for Form 2 slider sync. See backend/docs/LIVE-CHAT.md for testing.

post.description: Create a new account. If universityId is provided, creates a Student row so the user gets role student.

400.description: Validation error or email already in use

post.description: Validate email/password and return user and JWT.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user (from JWT).
Superadmin: all users; Admin: only their university students.

post.description: Admin or Superadmin (real signup is POST /auth/register).

get.description: Self, or Superadmin, or Admin (students at their uni only).

put.description: Self, or Superadmin, or Admin (students at their uni only).

delete.description: Superadmin only (platform-level action; university admin cannot delete accounts).

post.description: Student only. Create exchange from offer + request + conversation.

Student only, participant only. Requires both students to have PATCHed exchange-readiness ready. Creates one or more Exchange + Session rows; VideoSession if online; PaidExchange + Payment if paid. Resets readiness flags after success.

409.description: Exchange readiness not satisfied for both students

post.description: Student only. Updates full name, university, replaces offered/requested skills not tied to an Exchange.

get.summary: Check mutual match with another student
get.description: Student only. Query: otherStudentId (integer). Returns matched and directional pair hints.
Student participant only. Returns suggested offer/request pairs, mutualSwapReady, and exchangeReadiness (iAmReady, peerReady, bothReady).
Public (e.g. for registration dropdown).
Public.
Query: ?mine=true for own offers.
Query: ?mine=true for own requests.

patch.description: Student only. Body: { status }. Enum: open, matched, closed.

get.description: Student only. Returns conversations where the current user is a participant.

409.description: No mutual skill match — conversation not created

get.description: Student only. Caller must be a participant.

patch.description: Student only. Body: { ready: boolean }. Emits `exchange_readiness` to the conversation Socket.io room.

get.description: Student only. Query: limit (default 100, max 200). Caller must be a participant.

post.description: Student only. Body: { content }. Message is saved and then emitted over Socket.io to the conversation room so the other participant receives it in real time (listen for 'message' event).

201.description: Message created; same payload is emitted via Socket.io to the conversation room.

403.description: Student required or not a participant

get.description: Student: own; Admin/Superadmin: scoped.

patch.description: Body: { status }. Enum: pending, active, completed, cancelled. Student (participant), Admin, or Superadmin.

get.description: Query: ?exchangeId=. Student only.

patch.description: Body: { status }. Enum: scheduled, ongoing, completed, cancelled. Student only.

get.description: Query: ?exchangeId= or ?revieweeId=.

post.description: Student only. Body: revieweeId, rating (1-5), exchangeId/sessionId optional, feedback optional.

get.description: Query: ?studentId= or mine.
Admin/Superadmin.
Query: ?skillId=.
Admin: university-scoped; Superadmin: all; Student: query studentId (self or as allowed) or skillId (own attempts only). Evaluations are created by POST /skill-quiz/submit, not here.
Admin only: students at their university.
Superadmin only.
Superadmin only.

Admin: university-scoped stats (totalStudents, totalExchanges, totalPayments, totalPaymentAmount). Superadmin: platform stats including totalUniversities, totalStudents, and universitiesStudentCounts (array of { universityId, universityName, studentCount } per university).

200.description: Report data (shape depends on role; superadmin includes universitiesStudentCounts)

get.description: Returns per-month totalAmount (PKR) and paymentCount. Superadmin: all payments. Admin: payments where offerer is at admin university. Query: months (1–36, default 12).

200.description: { success, data: { months, series: [{ period, totalAmount, paymentCount }] } }

get.description: Returns per-month exchangeCount by Exchange.CreatedAt. Superadmin: all exchanges. Admin: exchanges where offer or request student is at admin university.

200.description: { success, data: { months, series: [{ period, exchangeCount }] } }

get.summary: Top skills by offers, requests, and exchanges
get.description: Superadmin: platform-wide. Admin: only students at your university. Query: limit (1–30, default 10).

200.description: { success, data: { limit, skills: [{ skillId, skillName, offerCount, requestCount, exchangeCount }] } }

get.description: Superadmin only. Counts exchanges where an offer or request student belongs to each university. Query: limit (1–30, default 10).

200.description: { success, data: { limit, universities: [{ universityId, universityName, exchangeCount }] } }

bearerAuth.description: JWT from POST /auth/login or POST /auth/register. Header: Authorization: Bearer <token>

universityId.description: Optional. If provided, creates Student row so user gets role student.
